query: SELECT 'incoming_stock' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM incoming_stock UNION ALL SELECT 'variants_with_stock' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM product_variants WHERE stockQuantity > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'variants_with_transit' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM product_variants WHERE inTransitQuantity > 0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT 'incoming_stock' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM incoming_stock UNION ALL SELECT 'variants_with_stock' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM product_variants WHERE stockQuantity > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'variants_with_transit' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM product_variants WHERE inTransitQuantity > 0;
